cases.prompt: I just staged a bug fix and a small refactor — write me a good commit message for it.
cases.note: positive — drafting a commit message from staged changes

cases.prompt: Rewrite this commit message to follow conventional commits: 'fixed stuff'.
What's a good recipe for dinner tonight?
Undo my last git commit and unstage the changes.
cases.note: confusability negative — shares commit/git vocabulary but the intent is undoing a commit, not authoring or improving a message; must NOT fire writing-commit-messages
